name: Shrine
description: Ryomen Sukuna's innate technique. Cleave and Dismantle adaptively carve the target.

name: Limitless
description: The Gojo clan's innate technique  manipulation of space at infinity. Brings things to a halt (Infinity / Blue), amplifies them (Red), and converges them (Hollow Purple). Functionally Useless without the power of the Sixe Eyes
